content.text: {"query":"general","total_results":3,"articles":[{"id":"KB-001","title":"Standard Return Policy","category":"returns","summary":"Our standard return policy allows returns within 30 days of delivery for most items.","body":"Customers may return most items within 30 days of delivery for a full refund. Items must be in their original condition and packaging.","url":"https://help.example.com/returns/standard-policy"},{"id":"KB-004","title":"Shipping & Delivery Overview","category":"shipping","summary":"How we ship orders and how to track your package.","body":"Standard shipping takes 5-7 business days. We ship via FedEx, UPS, and USPS.","url":"https://help.example.com/shipping/overview"},{"id":"KB-005","title":"Gold Tier Membership Benefits","category":"membership","summary":"Perks and benefits for Gold tier members.","body":"Gold tier members enjoy free standard shipping, extended 45-day return window, and 2x loyalty points.","url":"https://help.example.com/membership/gold-benefits"}]}
